info.title: Pricing Service
info.description:
Manages prices, price sheets, base prices, price audits

 **Last update**: 11 feb 26, 12:39 p. m.

tags.name: Price Sheet
tags.description:
The price sheets are used to create different prices of the same SKU for the different sales channels, thus allowing them to have personalized SKU prices.
The price sheets can be related to one or more sales channels, as these are related to the accounts of the integrated platforms, the price lists allow to relate prices to the accounts.

tags.name: Price
tags.description:
This entity manages the prices of SKUs within a Price Sheet.

A Price is composed of the following fields:
- `sku`: The SKU `id`. This field refers to the **Janis Catalog Service**. See [Janis Catalog Service](/v2/service/catalog).
- `priceSheet`: The ID of the Price Sheet. Refers to the `id` of the **PriceSheet** entity. See [Price Sheet](/v2/service/pricing#tag/Price-Sheet).
- `price`: A positive number representing the selling price.
- `listPrice`: A positive number representing the list price. This value is always greater than `price`.
- `costPrice`: A positive number representing the cost of the product.
- `minQuantity`: A positive number indicating the minimum quantity of SKUs required for the price to apply (e.g., wholesale pricing).
- `dateFrom`: An **ISO 8601** date that indicates when the price becomes valid.
- `dateTo`: An **ISO 8601** date that indicates when the price is no longer valid.
- `status`: Indicates the current status of the price (`active` or `inAudit`).

#### Dateless prices

Prices with an active date range (`dateFrom` is in the past and `dateTo` is in the future) and a duration greater than 5 years are considered **dateless**.

- For these prices, `dateFrom` and `dateTo` are removed during processing.
- Only the most recently created *dateless* price for a given SKU and Price Sheet will be kept; older ones will be ignored.

tags.name: Base Price
tags.description: Base prices work as a default price for an SKU, we can create multiple prices per SKU but only one base price per SKU. The base price does not have price lists.

tags.name: Sku Price
tags.description: Sku prices are used to manage the prices of SKUs within a Sales Channel.

tags.name: Price File
tags.description: Price files with all prices by SalesChannel

tags.name: Price Change
tags.description: Price changes are used to record variations in the prices of SKUs, generate a history of price increases or decreases and allow you to have more control over them.

tags.name: Price Audit
tags.description:
We call "Price Control" (or "Price Audit") the process in which it is decided whether a price change should take place.
Each price change will be validated according to limits configured (or not) in its price list.
The limits are expressed in percentages and are:

  - Increment Limit (`incrementThreshold`)
  - Decrement limit (`decrementThreshold`)

When a price change exceeds the configured limits, the price is locked without making the modification. This lock is expressed with the inAudit status of the price.

In addition to the state change, a record of a new entity is created to perform the control itself. In this price control record (PriceAudit with pending status) you will find the necessary data so that you can analyze and "approve" or "reject" said modification.

parameters.name: entity
parameters.description: The name of the entity that owns the settings to be retrieved

parameters.name: entity
parameters.description: The name of the entity that owns the settings to be updated

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The SKU ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Sku** Entity of **Janis Catalog Service**. See [Janis Catalog Service](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Sku).

parameters.name: salesChannel
parameters.description:
The Sales Channel. This refer to the `id` of the **Sales Channel** Entity of **Janis Commerce Service**. See [Sales Channel](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Sales-Channel).
The Sales Channel filter as an String or String Array.
- Filter as a String `salesChannel=5e711c7b3d5b9100074b9504`
- Filter as a String Array `salesChannel[0]=5e711c7b3d5b9100074b9504&salesChannel[1]=5fc0fd195a32c9d9b94ec35a`

get.summary: Get a list of the Sku Prices

parameters.name: skuIds
parameters.description: The SKU ID. This refer to the `id` of the **SKU** Entity of **Janis Catalog Service**. See [Janis Catalog Service](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Sku).

parameters.name: salesChannelsIds
parameters.description: The Sales Channel. This refer to the `id` of the **Sales Channel** Entity of **Janis Commerce Service**. See [Sales Channel](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Sales-Channel).

parameters.name: addSalesChannels
parameters.description: Whether to add the sales channels to the response.

get.summary: Get a list of the price audits

id.description: The unique identifier of the item

dateModified.description: The date of the last modification

userCreated.description: The ID of the user who created the item. This refer to the `id` of the **User** Entity of **Janis ID Service**. See [User](/v2/service/id#tag/User).

userModified.description: The ID of the user who last modified the item. This refer to the `id` of the **User** Entity of **Janis ID Service**. See [User](/v2/service/id#tag/User).

priceSheetId.description:
The Price Sheet ID.
This refer to the `id` of the **PriceSheet** Entity. See [Price Sheet](/v2/service/pricing#tag/Price-Sheet).

priceSheetReferenceId.description:
The Price Sheet Reference ID.
This refer to the `referenceId` of the **PriceSheet** Entity. See [Price Sheet](/v2/service/pricing#tag/Price-Sheet).

skuId.description: The SKU ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Sku** Entity of **Janis Catalog Service**. See [Sku](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Sku).

skuReferenceId.description: The SKU Reference ID. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Sku** Entity of **Janis Catalog Service**. See [Sku](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Sku).

listPriceValue.description:
The list price value.

**Important:** On `write` Apis if set to `0`, the value will be cleared.

costPriceValue.description:
The cost price value.

**Important:** On `write` Apis if set to `0`, the value will be cleared.

minQuantity.description:
The minimal quantity of an SKU to apply the specified price.
This field is used to generate the concept known as "price by quantity".

dateFrom.description:
The date from which the price becomes valid.

- Must be an **ISO 8601** formatted string. See [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) for more information.
- Must be earlier than `dateTo`.
- If the price range (`dateFrom` to `dateTo`) exceeds **5 years**, it will be considered a **dateless** price. In such cases, both `dateFrom` and `dateTo` will be removed during processing.

dateTo.description:
The date until which the price remains valid.

- Must be an **ISO 8601** formatted string. See [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) for more information.
- Must be later than `dateFrom`.
- If the price range (`dateFrom` to `dateTo`) exceeds **5 years**, it will be considered a **dateless** price. In such cases, both `dateFrom` and `dateTo` will be removed during processing.

dateFromDay.description: The day from where the price will apply.

dateToDay.description: The day until the price will apply.

salesChannelId.description: The Sales Channel ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Sales Channel** Entity of **Janis Commerce Service**. See [Sales Channel](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Sales-Channel).

salesChannelsIds.description: A list of sales channels IDs. This refer to the `id` of the **Sales Channel** Entity of **Janis Commerce Service**. See [Sales Channel](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Sales-Channel).

isExpired.description: Whether the price is expired. This is when the `dateTo` is in the past.

priceSheetName.description:
The name of the priceSheet. This refer to the `name` of the [PriceSheet](/v2/service/pricing#tag/PriceSheet) Entity.

This field is only available if the `priceSheetData` parameter is set to `true`

priceSheetReferenceId.description:
The reference id of the warehouse. This refer to the `referenceId` of the [PriceSheet](/v2/service/pricing#tag/PriceSheet) Entity.

This field is only available if the `priceSheetData` parameter is set to `true`

currency.description:
The Sales Channel currency. This refer to the `currency` of the **SalesChannel** Entity of **Janis Commerce Service**. See [Sku](/v2/service/commerce#tag/SalesChannel).
Is used the first Sales Channel related to the Price Sheet of the Price.

PriceBatch.description: A new price in batch to create

priceId.description: The Price ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Price** entity. See [Price](/v2/service/pricing#tag/Price)

previousPrice.description: The previous price value when the price change record was created

previousListPrice.description: The previous list price value when the price change record was created

previousCostPrice.description: The previous cost price value when the price change record was created

currentPrice.description: The current/updated price value when the price change record was created

currentListPrice.description: The current/updated price value when the price change record was created

currentCostPrice.description: The current/updated price value when the price change record was created

priceDifference.description: The difference between the previous price and current price

listPriceDifference.description: The difference between the previous list price and current list price

costPriceDifference.description: The difference between the previous cost price and current cost price

salesChannelIsActive.description: Determinate if the SalesChannel is active or not

url.description: The price file download signed url

lastUpdateDate.description: The date the PriceFile was last updated for the SalesChannel received

PriceFileTotalsList.description: A list of Price File Totals

quantity.description: The quantity of Prices generate in the file for the Sales Channel

salesChannels.description:
A list of Sales channels Reference IDs `referenceId`.
This field refer to **Janis Commerce Service**. See [Janis Commerce Service](/v2/service/commerce).

**Only valid if neither *salesChannelsToAdd* nor *salesChannelsToRemove* are received**

SalesChannelReferenceId.description:
The Sales Channel Reference ID `referenceId`.
This field refer to **Janis Commerce Service**. See [Janis Commerce Service](/v2/service/commerce).

SalesChannelReferenceIdsDeltas.description:
A list of Sales channels Reference IDs `referenceId`.
This field refer to **Janis Commerce Service**. See [Janis Commerce Service](/v2/service/commerce).

**Only valid if *salesChannels* is not received**

**If both delta properties are received, the removal operation will be performed last. 
  This will delete any sales channel that is also present in *salesChannelsToAdd***

itemsNotModified.description: The price sheets that already exists and was not modified

itemsError.description: The price sheets that was not be able to process

items.example: Sales channel reference id does not exist

price-sheet-ref-001: Sales channel reference id does not exist

incrementThreshold.description:
The increment threshold of the Price Sheet, this field is a number, but represents a percentage.
This is used for determinate if price changes requires an audit process.

decrementThreshold.description:
The decrement threshold of the Price Sheet, this field is a number, but represents a percentage.
This is used for determinate if price changes requires an audit process.

ScSkuPrice.description: A sku price object for listing

createPriceChanges.description: This setting is used to determine if should create price changes

inactivateExpiredPrices.description: This setting is used to determine if should inactivate expired prices when window ends

bestPrice.description: The best price selected from the price list. If there are no prices, the base price will be used as the best.

priceId.description: The audited price ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Price** Entity. See [Price](/v2/service/pricing#tag/Price).

auditPrice.description: The `price` object that has exceeded the threshold and must be audited.

priceDifference.description: The difference between the `price` and `auditPrice` values.

changePercentage.description: The percentage difference between the `price` and `auditPrice` values.

thresholdType.description: The threshold type. This refer to the `thresholds` of the **PriceSheet** Entity. See [Price Sheet](/v2/service/pricing#tag/Price-Sheet).

thresholdValue.description: The threshold value. This refer to the `thresholds` of the **PriceSheet** Entity. See [Price Sheet](/v2/service/pricing#tag/Price-Sheet).

auditedDate.description: The date when the price was audited (approved/rejected).

auditedBy.description: The user who audited the price (approved/rejected).

id.name: id
id.description: The unique identifier of the item

priceAuditId.name: id
priceAuditId.description:
The Price Audit ID.
This refer to the `id` of the **PriceAudit** Entity. See [Price Audit](/v2/service/pricing#tag/Price-Audit).

PriceCustomParameter.name: priceSheetData
PriceCustomParameter.description:
Indicates if more information about priceSheet needs to be added.
When `true`, the fields `priceSheetName` and `priceSheetReferenceId` will be added to the response

PriceFileFilters.name: filters
PriceFileFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

x-janis-total.description: The total amount of records in the list

x-janis-total-created.description: The total amount of items created

x-janis-total-updated.description: The total amount of items updated

x-janis-total-not-modified.description: The total amount of items not modified

x-janis-total-error.description: The total amount of items with error

itemsCreated.description:
Items which were created successfully.
- The *key* of the *object* is the `skuReferenceId` of the created item.
- The *value* of the *object* is the `id` of the created item.

itemsUpdated.description:
Items which were updated successfully.
- The *key* of the *object* is the `skuReferenceId` of the updated item.
- The *value* of the *object* is the `id` of the updated item.

itemsNotModified.description:
Items that did not need to be modified.
This occurs when the item in the service **is equal** to the received item.
- The *key* of the *object* is the `skuReferenceId` of the non modified item.
- The *value* of the *object* is the `id` of the non modified item.

itemsError.description:
Items with some error.
- The *key* of the *object* is the `skuReferenceId` of the item.
- The *value* of the *object* is the validation message error.

x-janis-total-created.description: The total amount of items created

x-janis-total-updated.description: The total amount of items updated

x-janis-total-not-modified.description: The total amount of items not modified

x-janis-total-in-audit.description: The total amount of items in audit process

x-janis-total-error.description: The total amount of items with error

errorMessage.example: Invalid sku: Received a referenceId which doesn't match with any existing sku
